summary: Start M6-ALPHA-NO-P0P1-VALIDATION-001 after M6-ADVISER-INTERVENTION-EVIDENCE-001 closure checkpoint entered origin/main. The test_engineer must validate Alpha has no accepted P0/P1 blockers across determinism, save/load, command parity, security, package boundaries, full tests, content validation, batch auto-run, Web/Storybook/E2E, accessibility, desktop security/package smoke, and known M5 limits without implementing features or downgrading true P0/P1 failures.

tests_run.result: Clean on test/m6-alpha-no-p0p1-validation before start checkpoint.
Task JSON was valid before start.

decisions: Start M6-ALPHA-NO-P0P1-VALIDATION-001 as the highest-priority dependency-ready M6 task after M6-ADVISER-INTERVENTION-EVIDENCE-001 closure PR entered origin/main at 3bf69c58f4143242b47b3f0db93bcc03b28b1aa7.
This is M6 Alpha no-P0/P1 evidence, not the formal M6 exit gate.
Any real P0/P1 found must be BLOCKED or REQUEST_CHANGES and routed to the responsible writer; do not downgrade severity to pass.
No feature implementation, roadmap/gate doc edits, release artifact edits, telemetry, accounts, server/multiplayer, arbitrary-code mods, manual node battle, or commercial decision is authorized.
PROJECT_STATUS.md is forbidden for this task and must not be modified.
risks: R4 validation can be long-running and may expose genuine blockers; preserve exact command outputs and failure evidence.
Desktop package/security and Storybook/E2E may be environment-sensitive; distinguish infrastructure failure from product blocker without hiding either.
M5 PASS_WITH_LIMITS context must be rechecked explicitly without reopening already accepted gates.
requested_action: Run required validation commands, record no-P0/P1 evidence or blockers, update only allowed paths, and emit REVIEW handoff to qa_reviewer.
